Chronology of every recorded fact about [[House Arelius]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — House Arelius is a team whose members might be Eithan's cousins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — House Arelius has a crest sewn in white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Veris Arelius belongs to House Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — House Arelius has been watching Lindon.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Reigan would have held the remainder of House Arelius hostage to force Eithan's withdrawal from the competition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — House Arelius is described as easy prey without a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — House Arelius is under the protection of Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — House Arelius cannot appropriately subsidize Eithan's advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — House Arelius was left leaderless and in ashes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — House Arelius has specific employment conditions for workers.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon has a canister marked with the symbol of House Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon and Eithan previously had to borrow the name of House Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan is a scion of House Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — The silver cube Lindon holds is marked with the symbol of the modern House Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Similar failures to Ozmanthus' work were once kept beneath House Arelius.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — House Arelius has been reduced to wreckage.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — House Arelius forces pushed into House Shen territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — House Arelius is involved in a fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — House Arelius was being fought by Yushi and Calling Storms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — House Arelius is in a difficult situation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Mercy fought to save House Arelius.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — House Arelius has a stockpile of treasures unmatched in all the worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — House Arelius hid from the Dread War.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — House Arelius has connections everywhere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — House Arelius is a house that Reigan Shen claims no longer stands unrivaled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — House Arelius is a noble house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — The fall of House Arelius is predicted to happen two continents away from Moongrave.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
